message:
fix(audit): 3 more bugs from deep code audit (bd-21u,bd-2ug,bd-1l7)

- Cap ballast file_count at u32::MAX in config validation to prevent
  silent index truncation in BallastManager (bd-21u)
- Circuit breaker now halts batch immediately instead of cooldown-and-retry
  which could cycle indefinitely (bd-2ug)
- Replace unreliable permissions().readonly() with nix::access(W_OK)
  for effective permission check in deletion preflight (bd-1l7)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
